div.p: Build fast, responsive, and scalable websites with our expert web development services.

div.h2: Odoo Website Development That Works as Hard as Your Business Does

div.p: Creyox Technologies is an Odoo website development company that builds more than just websites. We build connected business platforms where your site, your store, your CRM, and your operations run as one unified Odoo system.

From custom-themed corporate sites to complex multi-vendor eCommerce platforms, our certified Odoo developers ensure every line of code is optimized for speed, security, and scalability. We don't just "install" Odoo; we architect digital experiences that integrate natively with your inventory, sales, and accounting workflows, eliminating the need for disjointed third-party plugins and manual data entry.
100+ Websites Delivered | Odoo Certified Developers | End-to-End Web Services

div.class: partner-image-box border-0 bg-transparent d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

img.style: object-fit: contain; transform: scale(1.4); transform-origin: left center; z-index: 1;

div.p: If you're still running your website separately from your business operations, you already know the pain of disjointed data and repetitive manual tasks.

div.h3: Systems don't talk to each other
div.p: With our Odoo web development services, your website is natively connected to inventory, CRM, sales, and accounting live, always in sync.
Our Odoo eCommerce development links your store directly to Odoo inventory and invoicing products, stock, and orders update automatically.
A properly built Odoo website replaces your CMS, your store, your blog, your analytics, and your marketing tools in one platform you already own.

div.h2:
Your Website Shouldn't Just Look Good
It Should Run Your Business
div.p: Traditional CMS platforms like WordPress give you a website. Odoo gives you a connected business platform. When Creyox builds your website on Odoo, every page, every product, every form, and every visitor is linked directly to your CRM, your inventory, your sales pipeline, and your marketing campaigns out of the box, without plugins, without middleware.
Disconnected systems requiring complex plugin architectures.
All-in-one connected platform designed for agility and scalability.

div.h2:
Complete Odoo Web Development
Services for Every Business Need
div.p: From a clean corporate website to a fully integrated Odoo eCommerce platform we scope, design, build, and support every project with the same certified Odoo expertise.
We design and develop fully custom websites on the Odoo platform responsive, fast, and connected to your business data from day one. No third-party CMS, no disconnected tools.

ul.li: Custom page design and layout development
Odoo website builder configuration and theming
Multi-language and multi-currency setup
SEO-ready structure and metadata configuration
Blog, FAQ, and content module setup

div.p: A fully featured Odoo eCommerce website development service, your online store built directly inside Odoo, connected natively to your inventory, invoicing, and CRM.

ul.li: Odoo eCommerce store design and configuration
Product catalogue, variants, and pricing setup
Payment gateway integration (Razorpay, Stripe, PayU)
Inventory and warehouse sync with eCommerce orders
Checkout flow, cart, and wishlist configuration

div.p: When a standard Odoo website isn't enough, we build custom web applications on top of the Odoo framework tailored workflows, custom portals, and bespoke logic.

ul.li: Custom Odoo module and web controller development
Client and vendor portal development
Custom form and workflow automation
API-driven data display and integration
Role-based access and user management

div.p: Full-stack web application development using Python, JavaScript, and the Odoo OWL framework production-grade applications that live inside your Odoo environment.

ul.li: Odoo OWL and QWeb frontend development
Python backend and business logic development
REST API development and third-party integration
Database design and Odoo model development
Performance optimisation and security hardening

div.p: Already running an online store on Shopify, WooCommerce, or Magento? We migrate your entire store to Odoo eCommerce products, customers, orders, and SEO structure intact.

ul.li: Full eCommerce platform migration to Odoo
Product data, customer, and order migration
URL redirect mapping for SEO preservation
Payment and shipping configuration on Odoo
Post-migration testing and performance review

div.p: Your website doesn't stop needing care after launch. We provide ongoing Odoo website maintenance updates, performance monitoring, content changes, and security patches.

ul.li: Page speed and Core Web Vitals monitoring
Content updates and new page development
Security patch application and access review
Performance reporting and SEO health checks

div.h2: Why Choose our Website Development Services
div.p: We are not a generic web agency that happens to know Odoo. We are an Odoo partner which means we build websites that are engineered to work with your entire Odoo ecosystem from the ground up.
Every Odoo website we build looks and works perfectly on desktop, tablet, and mobile no compromise.
Your website connects directly to Odoo CRM, inventory, accounting, and marketing no plugins, no manual sync.
Full Odoo eCommerce development with inventory sync, payment gateways, and automated invoicing built in.
Odoo's built-in SEO tools plus our configuration ensure your website is structured to rank from the moment it goes live.
Fast-loading pages, optimised images, and clean code we build for Core Web Vitals and real user experience.
Reach global customers with Odoo's native translation and localised pricing features configured by our team.
Odoo's security model plus our development best practices mean your website is protected from the ground up.
Visitor behaviour, conversion data, and marketing attribution tracked natively in Odoo without separate tools.
Connect your Odoo website to payment gateways, CRMs, ERPs, or any external system via clean REST APIs.
We stay with you after go-live updates, new pages, performance monitoring, and support included.

div.h2: Odoo Websites Built Around How Your Industry Works

div.p: Professional Odoo websites with client portals, service showcases, contact forms, and CRM-connected lead capture.
Full Odoo eCommerce website development product catalogue, inventory sync, multi-payment checkout, and loyalty.
Course delivery websites with Odoo eLearning integration, student portals, and online payment for enrolments.
Event websites with Odoo registration, ticketing, online payments, and attendee management built in.
Service booking websites integrated with Odoo appointments, CRM, and automated follow-up workflows.
Supplier portals, product specification pages, and quote request forms connected to Odoo sales pipelines.

div.h2: Odoo Gives Your Website Capabilities No Other CMS Can Match
div.p: When Creyox builds your website on Odoo, you're not just getting pages. You're getting a full marketing, sales, and eCommerce platform all accessible from one login, all sharing one database with your business operations.
Design and edit pages visually no developer needed for content updates.
Sell products with full inventory sync, payment integration, and automated invoicing.
Publish articles, manage SEO, and drive organic traffic directly in Odoo.
Send campaigns, track opens, and measure ROI all connected to your website visitors.
Accept bookings and event registrations directly on your website with Odoo automation.
Understand how visitors use your site and which pages drive the most conversions.
Convert website visitors into support tickets or sales leads through Odoo Live Chat.

div.h2:
How We Build Your Odoo Website
A Clear Process, Every Time
div.p: No vague timelines. No surprise scope changes. Every Odoo website development project follows a structured process from discovery to delivery with your team involved at every stage.
We study your business goals, target audience, existing systems, and Odoo setup before a single wireframe is drawn.
Sitemap, page layouts, and UX wireframes reviewed and approved by you before any development begins.
We build on Odoo custom themes, modules, eCommerce configuration, integrations, and content setup.
Cross-device testing, browser compatibility, page speed checks, SEO review, and full functionality QA.
Smooth go-live with DNS setup guidance, followed by website maintenance services and dedicated Odoo support.

div.h2:
Odoo eCommerce Development:
One Platform for Your Store, Stock, and Sales

div.p: Stock updates instantly across online and offline sales.
Razorpay, Stripe, PayU, UPI, and COD all integrated seamlessly.
Orders trigger shipping, invoicing, and fulfilment automatically.
Run email campaigns, coupons, and abandoned cart recovery easily.
